docs.name: Meteors Card
docs.description: Card with animated meteor/shooting star particles falling through the background.

props.name: children
props.description: The payload rendering above the background particle effect.

props.name: className
props.description: Layout configurations for the wrapping card boundary.

props.name: meteorCount
props.description: Total integer quantity defining maximum concurrent active meteor particles.

props.name: meteorColor
props.description: CSS color string for the meteor heads and light trails.

docs.overview: MeteorsCard wraps content in a card with animated meteor streaks flying across it. The custom Tailwind animation is installed automatically via `uniqueui add`.

scenarios.title: Hero spotlight card
scenarios.description: Use a single MeteorsCard as a dark hero panel with a short headline and supporting line so the meteor field reads behind the copy.

changes: Fix SSR hydration mismatch by starting with no meteors and generating randomised positions after mount.
